title: All about monday WorkCavnas (session recording)

posts.author: Julietteb (Juliette )
posts.cookedHtml:
Have you tried monday WorkCanvas yet?

WorkCanvas, is the newest monday.com tool that allows you to visual, plan, brainstorm, and more in one collaborative whiteboard that syncs directly with your monday.com boards.

Watch the recording of our recent community hour where @GuyWorkCanvas shares different features and uses cases to help elevate your workflow with WorkCanvas.

Any questions for the WorkCanvas team? Ask below!

posts.author: freek-gcompany (Freek van de Griendt)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Julietteb or @GuyWorkCanvas thanks for sharing this amazing webinar!
Quick question: We currently don’t see the smart org chart template available in our workcanvas environment. Do you know how we can get it activated?

Also, any chance the slide deck can be shared with me?

Thanks so much in advance!

posts.author: ginnyjenlee (Ginny)
posts.cookedHtml: Good session @GuyWorkCanvas. Is it on the roadmap to get processes that mapped in WorkCanvas to then create a workflow/Monday.com board? ATM we use Miro to map our processes, and Monday.com to build the the project boards and there is a disconnect. It would be great if you make a change on a project that it changes the process map.

posts.author: Julietteb (Juliette )
posts.cookedHtml: Hey Sorry about the delay here. Where you able to find the template? You should be able to find it here. WorkCanvas.com

posts.author: Julietteb (Juliette )
posts.cookedHtml: Hi Ginny! Sorry about the delay here. But we just did another WorkCanvas webinar about something similar! DId you attend? If not here is the recording. Empower project management with monday WorkCanvas (session recording)
